name: Discussion Board Responses
description: Drafts substantive instructor responses to graduate student discussion board posts.

inputs.name: studentPost
inputs.description: The student's discussion board post to respond to.

inputs.name: weekTopic
inputs.description: The discussion topic or prompt for this week.

inputs.name: toneGuidance
inputs.description: Preferred tone or emphasis for this response.

outputs.name: response
outputs.description: Draft instructor response that engages with the student's ideas.
